  "claims": [
    "Education is essential to combat the growing drug crisis among young people.",
    "Red Ribbon Week was founded in 1985 in response to the murder of DEA Agent Enrique 'Kiki' Camarena.",
    "Red Ribbon Week has grown into a national awareness campaign that highlights the dangers of substance use.",
    "Dr. Bains will visit several schools to educate students about the dangers of drugs.",
    "Dr. Bains passed laws to initiate a local and statewide fentanyl task force.",

    "The Centers for Disease Control reported drug overdose deaths in California increased from over 4,500 in 2015 to 11,774 in 2023.",
